title: Your Complete Food Plan
dailyDefaults: Glass of warm water with lemon after
Three meals, max 1 snack if hungry

dailyTarget.floor: Don't go below 1,300. If you feel exhausted, dizzy, or your sleep crashes, add food.

breakfasts.title: Eggs + toast + berries
breakfasts.description: 2 boiled eggs + 1 slice whole wheat toast + 1/2 cup strawberries

breakfasts.title: Greek yogurt bowl
breakfasts.description: 3/4 cup Greek yogurt + 6 almonds + 6 walnuts + 1/2 cup strawberries + tiny drizzle honey

breakfasts.title: Oatmeal
breakfasts.description: 1/2 cup oats cooked in water + 1 tbsp almond butter + cinnamon + 1/2 cup strawberries

breakfasts.title: Besan chillas
breakfasts.description: 2 chillas (1/4 cup besan each, onion + tomato + coriander, 1/2 tsp oil) + 1/2 cup curd

breakfasts.title: Vermicelli upma
breakfasts.description: 1/2 cup vermicelli + frozen peas + carrot + mustard seeds + 5 peanuts + 1/2 tsp oil + 1/2 cup curd

breakfasts.title: Uttapam
breakfasts.description: 1 medium uttapam (store batter) + onion + tomato + coriander topping + 1/2 tsp oil + chutney or 1/4 cup curd

breakfasts.title: Protein smoothie + egg
breakfasts.description: 1 scoop whey + 3/4 cup Greek yogurt + 1/2 cup water + 1/2 cup strawberries + 6 almonds, blended + 1 boiled egg

breakfasts.title: Rava upma
breakfasts.description: 1/2 cup rava roasted, cooked with mustard seeds, curry leaves, ginger, frozen peas, carrot, 1 tsp ghee + 1/2 cup curd

breakfasts.title: Cheese toast + egg
breakfasts.description: 1 slice whole wheat toast + 1 slice cheese melted + 1 boiled egg + 1/2 cup strawberries

breakfasts.title: Savory rava chilla
breakfasts.description: 1/2 cup rava + 1/4 cup curd + water + onion + tomato + coriander + 1 tsp oil, 1 large pancake + chutney

lunches.title: Dal + rice + boiled veg salad
lunches.description: 1 cup dal + 1/2 cup rice + boiled veg salad + 2 tbsp curd

lunches.title: Curd rice + papad + cucumber
lunches.description: 3/4 cup rice + 1/2 cup curd mixed in + mustard/curry leaf tempering + 1 papad + cucumber

lunches.title: Rice podi
lunches.description: 3/4 cup rice + 2 tsp podi + 1 tsp ghee + 1/2 cup curd + boiled veg salad

lunches.title: Khichdi
lunches.description: 1/4 cup moong dal + 1/4 cup rice + 1 tsp ghee + frozen veg + 1/2 cup curd

lunches.title: Egg sandwich + dal
lunches.description: 2 boiled eggs mashed + 2 slices whole wheat bread + mint chutney + cucumber + small bowl dal

lunches.title: Dal + rice + fried egg + salad
lunches.description: 1 cup dal + 1/2 cup rice + 1 egg fried in 1/2 tsp ghee + boiled veg salad

lunches.title: Shakshuka + toast
lunches.description: 2 eggs poached in 3/4 cup tomato basil sauce with sauteed onion + bell pepper + 1 slice whole wheat toast

lunches.title: Chole + rice + cucumber
lunches.description: 3/4 cup chole (canned chickpeas simmered with onion, tomato, spices) + 1/3 cup rice + cucumber + lemon wedge

dinners.title: Omelette + roti + greens
dinners.description: 2-egg omelette + 1 small roti + 1 cup sauteed spinach with garlic

dinners.title: Thin dal + cheese toast
dinners.description: 1.5 cups thin dal (extra water + cumin, from Sunday batch) + 1 slice whole wheat toast with 1 slice cheese melted

dinners.title: Curd rice + veg salad
dinners.description: 1/2 cup rice + 1/2 cup curd + tempering + boiled veg salad

dinners.title: Khichdi + curd (smaller portion)
dinners.description: 1/4 cup dal + 1/4 cup rice + 1 tsp ghee + frozen veg + 1/2 cup curd

dinners.title: Veg salad + eggs + roti
dinners.description: Boiled veg salad + 2 boiled eggs + 1 small roti

dinners.title: Dal + rice + egg + cucumber
dinners.description: 1/2 cup dal + 1/3 cup rice + 1 boiled egg + cucumber slices

dinners.title: Shakshuka (lighter)
dinners.description: 2 eggs poached in 1/2 cup tomato basil sauce + 1/2 slice toast

dinners.title: Moong dal chilla + curd
dinners.description: 2 moong dal chillas (1/4 cup soaked moong blended, onion + coriander, 1/2 tsp oil) + mint chutney + 1/2 cup curd

dinners.title: Egg bhurji + roti + salad
dinners.description: 2 eggs scrambled with onion, tomato, coriander (1/2 tsp ghee) + 1 small roti + boiled veg salad

snacks: 3/4 cup Greek yogurt + 1 tsp honey (120 cal / 15g protein)
Roasted makhana: 1 cup, dry-roasted with chili powder (90 cal)
2 squares (10g) 70%+ dark chocolate + 5 almonds (130 cal, max 2x/week)
Healthy mug cake: 3 tbsp oats blended into flour + 1 egg + 1 tbsp Greek yogurt + 1 tsp honey + cocoa powder + pinch baking powder, microwave 90 sec (180 cal / 10g protein)

recipes.title: Boiled veg salad (stir-fry replacement)
lines: Boil/steam 8-10 min: 1 cup broccoli florets, 1/2 cup carrots sliced, 1/2 cup green beans, 1/2 cup peas (frozen fine), 1/2 cup corn (optional).
Drain. Toss with 1/2 tsp olive oil or ghee, salt, black pepper, 1/2 tsp lemon juice, pinch chaat masala or roasted cumin, chopped coriander.
Makes 3 servings, ~110 cal each. Keeps 3 days.

recipes.title: Shakshuka sauce batch (4 servings)
lines: 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 onion chopped, 4 garlic cloves, 1 red bell pepper chopped, 1 jar (~24 oz) tomato basil sauce, 1/2 tsp cumin, 1/2 tsp paprika, 1/2 tsp chili powder, salt to taste.
Saute onion + garlic + bell pepper 5 min, add spices 1 min, add tomato basil sauce, simmer 8 min.
Keeps 4-5 days in fridge. Freezes well.
To eat: heat 3/4 cup sauce in pan, crack 2 eggs in, cover 5 min until whites set. Serve with toast.

sundayPrep: After this, every weekday meal is 5-10 minutes of assembly.

grocery.produce: apples (7), strawberries (2 lbs), cucumber (3), tomatoes, onions, garlic, ginger, broccoli, carrots, green beans, lemons, mint, coriander, bell peppers (1 red, 1 green), spinach, frozen peas, frozen corn, frozen mixed veg
grocery.protein: eggs (2 dozen), Greek yogurt (large), moong dal, masoor dal, chickpeas
grocery.pantry: rice, whole wheat bread, frozen rotis (Indian store), oats, besan, vermicelli, rava, uttapam/dosa batter (Indian store), instant rava idli mix, rice podi, almonds, walnuts, almond butter, makhana, dark chocolate (70%+), ghee, olive oil, honey, papad, store chutney, sliced cheese, tomato basil sauce (jar), basic spices (mustard seeds, curry leaves, turmeric, cumin, paprika, chili powder, chaat masala), cocoa powder, baking powder, whey protein

rules: All three meals, every day. No skipping.
Sunday prep is non-negotiable. Without it, this plan collapses by Wednesday.
If you start feeling weak, mood-crashy, or your sleep gets worse, add food. Don't push through.
One meal a week, eaten without thinking about any of this. Pizza, dinner with friends, whatever. Plan is not a prison.
